title: E-Commerce Fulfillment Center
description: A regional e-commerce leader needed flexible storage for 8,000+ SKUs with high-frequency daily picking. Heavy-duty selective racking delivered 100% pallet accessibility and 35% higher storage density through optimized aisle widths.
highlights: 35% more storage density with optimized aisles

title: Frozen Food Distribution Center
description: A major food distributor required high-density cold storage at -25°C with strict FIFO rotation for perishable goods. Drive-In with back-beam configuration achieved 80% space utilization in expensive refrigerated space.
highlights: FIFO compliance for food safety certification
40% energy cost savings vs. lower-density layout

title: Automotive Parts Distribution Hub
description: An automotive parts distributor handling 12,000+ pallet positions deployed Radio Shuttle systems across 3 warehouse zones. Automated shuttle carts eliminated forklift entry into racking lanes, improving both safety and throughput by 60%.
highlights: ROI achieved in 18 months vs. conventional racking
